---
title: "MSP input Denmark"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

Info on MSP experts MSP input for Denmark

::: {layout="[ [1,1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://testsysteemrapportage.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea/MSP2030.html#dk-msp-2030"></iframe>
```

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=144094709,ERqXHN3RQhSK2ZnQsbd-Ew&layers=I-jFOhIGT9OEI4oTi8c47Q&layerNames=MSP%20Havplan%20%28DK,%202024%29"></iframe>
```

:::
